_status:
DRAFT — review artifact, not loaded by dialogue_runner. Per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §1 (Murrow subsection), reshapes murrow_first_meeting from an eight-line conclusion-naming briefing into a three-observation briefing that hands the synthesis to Cula. The fourteen-day window line stays (a KPC fact, not a case-specific conclusion). The 'motion to set aside' line moves to a later state, gated on Cula having proposed the defective-service frame. The friend/Mister-Murrow exchange and the meeting-room handoff to Halina are preserved.

Merge strategy: when ready, the human (or Design) takes this draft, opens the live murrow.json, replaces ONLY the body of murrow_first_meeting and adds the new state murrow_post_frame_attaches_motion. All other states (before_pig, after_pig and its three response variants, post_briefing_pre_binder, has_binder_pre_crab, the two coffee_reaction states, court_readiness_check, idle_flavor) remain unchanged from the in-flight worktree state.

Voice discipline: every line audited against narrative_revision/voice_agents/murrow.md (dry archival register, near-no adjectives). Murrow names what is in the file; he does not name what the file means.
_design_role_handoff: All `_status: DESIGN_TODO` line slots need final voicing. Murrow's voice constraint is the tightest: zero adjectives if possible, archival-noun-phrase shape, comma splice acceptable.

states._comment: RESHAPED — LOAD-BEARING. The current eight-line case briefing collapses to three observation-shaped lines about THE FILE (the dates, the countersignature, the ex parte hearing). Murrow names facts; he does not name what the facts mean. The 'motion to set aside' line is removed from here and moved to murrow_post_frame_attaches_motion (which fires after Cula proposes a frame at Crab). The fourteen-day-from-actual-notice line stays — it is a fact about KPC time-limits, not a conclusion about Sikorska's case. The 'binder, second shelf, blue spine' line stays — it points to evidence, not to its meaning. The friend/Mister-Murrow exchange is preserved verbatim; Asia-friends comic beat preserved.
lines: Welcome to Pig & Swine. You've picked a noisy day to begin.
The case is the Sikorska eviction defense. Halina Sikorska, at number twelve. The notice in the file was served to number seven.
The building was renumbered in two thousand and fifteen. The two thousand and nineteen renewal in the file carries the landlord's countersignature.
Hearing already ran ex parte. The current resident at number seven brought the notice down three weeks late. Actual notice reached her on the twenty-eighth of April.
Statute on time-limits is fourteen days from actual notice. The math is yours.
Procedural binder, second shelf, blue spine. Rights memo clipped inside the front cover. Hearing Friday at fourteen hundred, courtroom four.
She has not formally retained yet. She is coming in this afternoon.
It is Murrow, to friends. The 'Mister' I keep for invoices.

lines.speaker: murrow
lines.text: I am still deciding whether reception staff qualify as friends or as workplace constellations.

lines.speaker: murrow
lines.text: Binder first. Memo second. Find me before fourteen hundred if anything in the binder reads wrong.

states._comment:
NEW state. Fires after Cula has proposed the defective-service frame to Crab. Murrow attaches the procedural verb — 'motion to set aside' — to the shape Cula has now named. The line is moved here from murrow_first_meeting. If Cula proposed merits_defence at Crab, this state does not fire and a sibling state (murrow_post_frame_walks_back) takes over. `once: true` because this is a beat, not a hint.

The key contract: Cula has named the SHAPE (wrong-door service). Murrow attaches the PROCEDURAL VEHICLE (motion to set aside, fourteen-day window). Crab named the CITATION (Article 135-bis § 2). Three NPCs, three distinct contributions, none of them duplicating Cula's synthesis work.
lines: Crab tells me you have read the binder.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Wrong-door service. I told Crab we file.

lines: We file a motion to set aside. Fourteen days from actual notice — we are inside the window. Hearing rescheduled, merits preserved.
Halina is at one. Mr. Pig will introduce; you will lead.

states._comment:
NEW state — sibling to murrow_post_frame_attaches_motion. Fires when Cula carried the wrong-shape frame past Crab. Murrow does not block; he names the cost. The motion will still be filed, but on the procedural defect — Murrow has already filed on service before Cula speaks. The court_outcome will calibrate narrower at the chapter close. Soft-fail per PROPOSAL §4.

Murrow's voice in this state: archival fact, not rebuke.
lines: Crab tells me you proposed the merits.
The merits are not the door we are at. The door we are at is service.
I have filed the motion to set aside on the service defect. The merits stay where they are. Halina is at one.

states._comment: RESHAPED. The current line ('Now Crab. Nothing else moves until service is checked') collapses Murrow's voice — Murrow does not say what needs checking. Reshaped to point Cula to Crab without naming the doctrinal task. Binder reads are now load-bearing flags (chapter1.binder_read_*) — Murrow can ask whether Cula has actually read.
lines: Now Crab. Page one and page two of the binder, before you find him.
Mm.

states.trigger: chapter1.has_law_binder == true && chapter1.has_rights_memo == true && chapter1.recruited_crab == true && chapter1.recruited_whimsy == true && !chapter1.court_ready
states._comment:
RESHAPED. The current readiness check has Murrow asserting 'Service first. Fair hearing second. Remedy last.' Reshape: Murrow ASKS Cula for the order. Cula's reply is an options block; the chosen order writes... well, it would write into a new flag (chapter1.closing_order or similar) which I am NOT adding in this SAVE_VERSION 17 cut. For v1, the options block writes into chapter1.proposed_frame as a no-op overwrite (the player can confirm or revise her earlier choice). For v2, add a closing_order enum and a SAVE_VERSION bump.

DESIGN_TODO: confirm v1 single-flag approach is acceptable, or pre-declare closing_order in v18 ahead of authoring this state. For this draft I'm keeping the line content equivalent to the current one minus the spoken-by-Murrow conclusion.
states._design_role_handoff: If the human prefers a third synthesis beat at court readiness, declare chapter1.closing_order at the next SAVE_VERSION bump and write the options block against it. For this draft, the readiness check stays close to the existing flow but moves the order-stating line from Murrow to a Cula option.
lines: Cula.
Procedural binder. On file.
Rights memo. On file.

lines.speaker: pig
lines.text: The printer lease has come back as a kraken. We renew next month, presumably with bait.

lines: Crab and Whimsy on the appearance. Confirmed.
Hearing at fourteen hundred. Courtroom four.

lines.speaker: pig
lines.text: When I was an apprentice, we had no readiness check. Only fear. We navigated by panic alone.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Service first. Fair hearing second. Remedy last. We leave at thirteen-thirty.

lines: Set.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Asia, has Mrs. Sikorska been told we're coming?

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: She rang an hour ago, Dr. A. Cula. She'll be there at quarter to.

idle_flavor: The paperwork is current. Whether it is correct is a separate question.
Ensure every form is stamped in triplicate.
Two pages are out of sequence. Not yours.
